text.title: PM Certification Alignment 2026 Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the target audience sit the PMP exam after 2026-07-01?

branch.when: post_2026 == true AND mapping_done == true AND weights_aligned == false
post_2026 == true AND mapping_done == true AND weights_aligned == true

conclusion.verdict: Rebalance item bank to ECO weights

example.trace: post_2026=true → mapping_done=true → weights_aligned=true → item bank rebalanced → ready for cohort.
